title: senecio macroglossus
intro: Senecio macroglossus, also known as the large-tongued ragwort or large-tongued Jacob's staff, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its bitter and astringent properties, making it useful for treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Senecio macroglossus include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve coughs and colds, and act as an anti-inflammatory. Senecio macroglossus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
